subject: Mail app not syncing Exchange mailbox
description: Built-in Mail app shows no new messages; webmail on the same phone confirms unread mail exists in the inbox.

ts_steps.title: Fetch New Data
ts_steps.action: Settings → Mail → Accounts → Fetch New Data — Push on globally.

ts_steps.title: Account Push
ts_steps.action: Set Exchange account to Push not Fetch.

ts_steps.title: Add Exchange
ts_steps.action: Add Account → Microsoft Exchange — complete modern auth MFA.

ts_steps.title: Safari OWA test
ts_steps.action: Same credentials in browser — proves server path.

internal_information: Push disabled, token expired, Low Data, compliance block.
